titleStmt.title: SII 24.507: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 507. (A.R. No. 336 of 1952-53.) ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL, INNER WALL OF THE ŪN1JALMAṆḌAPAM, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ANNAMŪRTI IMAGE.

summary.p: Records that ••• rumāḷ, wife of Tanmayaṉ (Dharmayaṉ), son of Tāttayaṉ, a Traivarṇika-Śrīvaishṇava of Śeyaṅgoṇḍala-gōtra, endowed a sum of 50 poṉ yielding an interest of 6 poṉ per annum for conducting worship to Annādi Emberumānār on the occasion of eight festivals named respectively after Bhūpati-Uḍaiyar, Ādi-Brahmā, Vīrappa-nāyakkar, Viruppaṇa-uḍaiyar, Achchutappa-nāyakkar, Tirumalai-rāja and two others. Also records an assignment of a tenth share of the offerings to Tiruvēṅgaḍat-Tāttayaṅgār-Tirumalayyaṅgār. The details of date viz. Śaka 1530, Sarvadhārin, Dhanus, śu. 7, Saturday, Uttiraṭṭādi regularly correspond to 1588 A.D., December 14, Saturday, ·54, f.d.n. ·05.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīvira
veṅkaṭapatidevamahārāyar pṛthivīrājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa
cakāpdam 1000 5 100 10 Itaṉmeṟ cellā niṉṟa sarvatāri samvatsa
rattu dhanunāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu śapdamiyum man=tavāramum
peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭi
ya kulāśinivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅ
kantiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrībhaṇṭārattu
kku I[t*tiruppati] traivarṇika śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷil ceyaṅkoṇ
ṭala gotrañca tāttayaṉ makaṉ taṉmayaṉ bhara�
māḷeṉ deṇṭaṉ samarppittu poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇ
ṉikkuṭuttapaṭi Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyam Āka tirukkoṭi Eṟṟukka
ṭṭaḷaikku perumāḷ Aṉṉāti Emperumāṉār koyil Eṟiyaṟuḷi
Amutuceytaruḷum tocaippaṭi 1-kku pu 7(1/2) Āka Amutu ceytaruḷum
[i ]viṉ tiruṉāḷ [śrī]pūpatiyuṭaiyār tirunāḷ tiru
ṉāḷ 1 Ātippiṟummāviṉ tiruṉāḷ 1 vīrappa nāyakkar tirunāḷ 1 viruppa
ṇa Uṭaiyar tiruṉāḷ 1 Accutappanāyakkar tirunāḷ 1 tirumalai rācāviṉ
tiruṉāḷ 1 Ākat tirukkoṭiyeṟṟam 8-kku tirukkoṭi Ēṟṟam 1-kku pu 7(1/2) Āka
varuṣamoṉṟukku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 6(1/2) poliyūṭṭāka śrīpaṇṭārattile
varkkam mutaliṭṭa poṉ 5 10- kku vaṭṭi ṉūṟṟukku pu 1 Āka mātam 1- kku pu 5 Āka
varuṣam 1- kku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 6- kku mutaliṭṭa poṉ 5 10- tum perumāḷ śrīpaṇṭāra
ttile Ēri kāyaḷileRead kālkaḷile .poṭṭu Inta vaṭṭiyil Utaiyam koṇṭu tiru
koṭiyeṟṟan toṟum Inta Orupaṭi tocai Amutu ceytaruḷa cantirā
tityavaraiyum ṉaṭakka kaṭavatākavum Itukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu
pattiloṉṟum Āka
śrīraṅkan tiruppati tirumalaitiruveṅkaṭattāttayyaṅkār rumala
putrapautraparamparaiyāka peṟṟuvarak kaṭavarākavum Intap po
liyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku
śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyaṉ Eḻuttu . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 24.507 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
